theme: Raising children alone while building a new life

sources.name: Ieshia Champs
sources.struggle: Foster care at age 6, homeless teen, dropped out senior year, became teen mom, house fire, laid off, widowed while 7 months pregnant, suicide attempt
sources.transformation: Pastor called saying 'God told me you'll be a lawyer', got GED, enrolled in community college, transferred to university, accepted to law school
sources.breakthrough: Graduated magna cum laude from law school with 5 children, passed bar exam, became Attorney Ieshia N. Champs
keyEmotionalMoments: Age 6: Taken by CPS from grandmother
Age 14: Bouncing between homes, worrying where to sleep tomorrow
Dropping out senior year, dream dying
2009 devastation: house fire, job loss, children's father died, suicide attempt
Pastor's unexpected call: 'God says you'll be a lawyer'
Law school fear with 5 children
Children helping with flash cards, serving as mock jury
Son secretly taking over duties (baths, snacks, school clothes)
Graduation photo with children holding 'We did it!' signs
Passing bar exam, becoming Attorney Ieshia N. Champs
keyQuotes: I was worried about whose house could I stay at the following day
I had to succeed for them and for myself
I responded by not just defying the odds, but destroying them

sources.name: Wayne Toh
sources.struggle: Wife developed depression, left when he started new business, alone with 4 children ages 5-11, financial strain, suicidal thoughts intensifying
sources.transformation: Friday night prayer of desperation, son brought 'Dads for Life' package next morning, vowed to never give up
sources.breakthrough: Offered stable job, children transferred to same school, career success, 12 years later all 4 children thriving
keyEmotionalMoments: Picture-perfect family with hidden struggles
Wife's depression, Wayne's escape fantasies
Leap of faith into photography business
Wife's behavioral changes, growing fear
The abandonment: 'Let me go, just let me go'
Divorce papers thrown by courier
Alone with four children, financial strain
Midnight drives to Malaysia to cry alone
Suicidal voices: 'Speed up and bang the car', 'Jump and end this'
Friday night prayer: 'God, I don't have the strength to fight anymore'
'Dads for Life' package from son (turning point)
Learning to love with God's love
12 years later: four thriving children
keyQuotes: I cannot fail... my children need me to succeed
Once I crossed the customs and hit the highway, the tears would burst out
Speed up and bang the car in front
God, I don't have the strength to fight all these suicidal thoughts anymore
Dads for Life - I knew God had heard me
You and your kids are still a family

sources.name: Stephanie Land
sources.struggle: Unexpected pregnancy at 28, trapped in abusive relationship, left with nothing, homeless shelter, cleaning houses for $9/hour, invisible worker, public stigma
sources.transformation: Writing 10 minutes daily, taking online classes, slowly working toward degree
sources.breakthrough: Graduated from university, wrote viral Vox article, book deal, NYT bestseller, Netflix adaptation
keyEmotionalMoments: Dreams of becoming a writer (childhood)
Unexpected pregnancy at 28
Trapped in abusive relationship
Leaving with nothing, homeless shelter
Daughter learning to walk in shelter
Taking humiliating cleaning job ($9/hour)
Becoming 'invisible' / nameless ghost
Public stigma for using food stamps
Endless bureaucracy of proving poverty
Kicked off food stamps while in school
Mia's struggles / rage episodes
Weekend bubbles of joy with daughter
Writing 10 minutes a day (persisting dream)
Graduation from university
Viral Vox article (1M+ views)
Book deal and national recognition
keyQuotes: My daughter learned to walk in a homeless shelter
I was overwhelmed by how much work it took to prove I was poor
Scraped out. Ghosts of our former selves.
I didn't have the privilege to feel
We would drift in a bubble, just me and this amazing kid
The only way anything is going to change is if we start listening

struggle: Rock bottom moments (suicide attempt, suicidal thoughts, homeless shelter)
Financial crisis (job loss, poverty, cleaning houses for low pay)
Alone with children (widowed, abandoned, left abusive relationship)
Children as motivation but also source of stress
perseverance: Unexpected support or message (pastor's call, 'Dads for Life' package, writing dream)
Refusing to give up despite overwhelming odds
breakthrough: Pivotal moment of determination (pastor's call, 'Dads for Life', writing 10 minutes daily)
Recognition and visibility (viral photo, media interviews, book deal)
transformation: Professional achievement (lawyer, successful father, bestselling author)
From invisible to visible, from broken to whole

bestMoments: Daughter learning to walk in homeless shelter (Stephanie)
Children helping with flash cards and mock jury (Ieshia)
Midnight drives to Malaysia to cry (Wayne)
compositeElements.universalExperience: Single parent facing overwhelming challenges, finding strength through children and unexpected support, transforming life through education and determination, proving that single parents can succeed against all odds

eslResonanceMultipliers: Learning & Education Journeys (GED → college → law school / university degree)
Overcoming 'Not Good Enough' (odds against them, public stigma, society's expectations)
Building New Life (homeless → attorney, broken → whole, invisible → visible)
First-Time Courage (starting school with children, learning to parent alone, leaving abuse)
Persistence Despite Setbacks (fire, death, abandonment, poverty, system failures)
Belonging & Identity (church family, support groups, finding new definition of family)
Connection Across Differences (colleagues helping, support systems, community acceptance)
Communication Barriers (being invisible, nameless, unheard - Stephanie's theme)
